chat_history.content: Find me 15 differentiated Please find me software and services vendors providing regulatory compliance solutions to RIAs and wealth management firms. I do not want consulting companies. companies in NCP Priority Geography (Eastern US).

Got it. I know what NCP looks for — founder-owned, differentiated, right to win, growing market, no PE on the cap table. I'll search multiple channels and only bring you companies I'm genuinely excited about (conviction 6+/10). You'll get 15 with investment memos. Give me feedback on each one and I'll learn your preferences.
[QA Bot] 29/30 candidates (96%) filtered as gov/nonprofit/public. Refining Apollo search parameters.

Boss bot, can you add the following companies to the pipeline and write memos on them: Smartria, Velocity FSS (Velocity FinCrime Solutions Suite), VS1 Finance, 17a-4 LLC, True West, Income Discovery,  Trillium Surveyor,  Terrapin Technologies,  ViewPoint Partners, Eventus, KYC2020, Fusion IQ, InvestEdge, Inc., and Ionfi.

I've added those 14 companies to the pipeline, increasing the target to 29. The next step is to write memos for each, ensuring they align with our investment criteria. Let me know if there's anything specific you want to prioritize in the memos.
